name: Grand Marnier Cranberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Place cranberries in a 8x8x2-inch glass baking dish.
3. Sprinkle sugar over the cranberries.
4. Pour orange juice concentrate over the sugar.
5. Cover tightly with foil.
6. Bake until juices form and cranberries are very soft, about 1 hour.
7. Uncover the dish.
8. Mix in the liqueur.
9. Cover the dish and refrigerate until very cold, about 4 hours (This sauce can be prepared up to 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.)
10. Makes approximately 2 cups.
